how.title: How it works
how.subtitle: Three steps - and your contract is ready to sign.

step1.title: Describe the deal
step1.desc: Enter details: brand, platform, content, payment. Takes less than a minute.

step2.title: Get your contract
step2.desc: AI generates a complete document with all clauses. You can edit it.

step3.title: Sign and close
step3.desc: Send a link to the brand. E-signature in browser - no downloads.

t1.text: I used to spend 2-3 hours on each contract with a lawyer. Now I do it in 5 minutes. Already closed 14 deals through ContractGen.
t1.name: Alina K.

t2.text: Brands started taking terms more seriously - I see the difference. Contracts look professional, and it changes negotiations.
t2.name: Max R.

t3.text: E-signature is just magic. Contracts used to get lost in email for weeks. Now we sign in 10 minutes.
t3.name: Diana Y.

faq.title: FAQ
faq.q1: Do I need a lawyer to use ContractGen?
faq.a1: No. Our templates are developed by lawyers specializing in media law. You answer questions - AI assembles the correct contract automatically.
faq.a2: Yes. Electronic signatures are recognized in most jurisdictions under e-signature laws. Contracts contain all necessary clauses to protect both parties.
faq.q3: What types of contracts are available?
faq.a3: Sponsored posts, UGC content, ambassadorships, NDA, content licensing, collaborations, and more - over 8 templates.
faq.q4: Can I edit the generated contract?
faq.a4: Of course. After generation, you can edit any section, add your own clauses, and save the modified template for future use.
faq.a5: You send a link to the brand. They sign right in the browser - no downloads or registration. You get a notification in real time.
